languages.text: {n}Соломон обводит взглядом собравшихся, взирающих на вас с изумлением и трепетом.{/n} "Звездн{mf|ый|ая} Госпо{mf|дин|жа}, значит... Ваше появление тут сродни историческому событию. Будьте уверены, местные станут следить за каждым вашим шагом, и ваши действия могут перевернуть жизнь этого отсталого мира".

{n}Solomorne looks at the crowd staring at you in wonder and trepidation.{/n} "So, 'Celestial {mf|Lord|Lady}'... Your coming is a historic event for these people. They will be watching your every step, and your actions may well transform their lives on this underdeveloped world."
languages.original_text: {n}Соломон обводит взглядом собравшихся, взирающих на вас с изумлением и трепетом.{/n} "Звездн{mf|ый|ая} Госпо{mf|дин|жа}, значит... Ваше появление тут сродни историческому событию. Будьте уверены, местные станут следить за каждым вашим шагом, и ваши действия могут перевернуть жизнь этого отсталого мира".

{n}Solomorne looks at the crowd staring at you in wonder and trepidation.{/n} "So, 'Celestial {mf|Lord|Lady}'... Your coming is a historic event for these people. They will be watching your every step, and your actions may well transform their lives on this underdeveloped world."

languages.text: {n}索罗蒙看着人群。所有人都直直地盯着你，目光中充满了惊讶、恐惧。{/n}“也就是说，‘来自上界的大人’……你的到来对这些人而言，是件可以记入史册的大事。他们会观察你的每个动作，而你的行为可能会改变他们在这个落后世界的人生。”
languages.original_text: {n}Solomorne looks at the crowd staring at you in wonder and trepidation.{/n} "So, 'Celestial {mf|Lord|Lady}'... Your coming is a historic event for these people. They will be watching your every step, and your actions may well transform their lives on this underdeveloped world."

traits.locale_text: {n}索罗蒙看着人群。所有人都直直地盯着你，目光中充满了惊讶、恐惧。{/n}“也就是说，‘来自上界的大人’……你的到来对这些人而言，是件可以记入史册的大事。他们会观察你的每个动作，而你的行为可能会改变他们在这个落后世界的人生。”

languages.text: {n}ソロモーンは、驚きと不安の入り混じった眼差しであなたを見つめている群衆を見た。{/n}「さあ、『天の{mf|君|姫}』…あなたの到来は、これらの人々にとっては歴史的な出来事です。彼らはあなたの一挙手一投足を見つめています。あなたの行動はこの未開の世界に生きる彼らの人生を変えることになるかもしれません」
languages.original_text: {n}Solomorne looks at the crowd staring at you in wonder and trepidation.{/n} "So, 'Celestial {mf|Lord|Lady}'... Your coming is a historic event for these people. They will be watching your every step, and your actions may well transform their lives on this underdeveloped world."

traits.locale_text: {n}ソロモーンは、驚きと不安の入り混じった眼差しであなたを見つめている群衆を見た。{/n}「さあ、『天の{mf|君|姫}』…あなたの到来は、これらの人々にとっては歴史的な出来事です。彼らはあなたの一挙手一投足を見つめています。あなたの行動はこの未開の世界に生きる彼らの人生を変えることになるかもしれません」

languages.text: {n}Solomorne escudriña el gentío que te observa maravillado y expectante.{/n} «Bien, “{mf|Señor|Señora} Celestial”... Su llegada constituye un hito histórico para estas personas. No le quitarán el ojo de encima a cada paso que dé, y sus actos bien podrían cambiar sus vidas en este mundo subdesarrollado».
languages.original_text: {n}Solomorne looks at the crowd staring at you in wonder and trepidation.{/n} "So, 'Celestial {mf|Lord|Lady}'... Your coming is a historic event for these people. They will be watching your every step, and your actions may well transform their lives on this underdeveloped world."

traits.locale_text: {n}Solomorne escudriña el gentío que te observa maravillado y expectante.{/n} «Bien, “{mf|Señor|Señora} Celestial”... Su llegada constituye un hito histórico para estas personas. No le quitarán el ojo de encima a cada paso que dé, y sus actos bien podrían cambiar sus vidas en este mundo subdesarrollado».

languages.text: {n}Üsteğmen sana merakla ve endişeyle bakan kalabalığı izliyor.{/n} "'Semavi {mf|Lordumuz|Leydimiz} demek... Gelişiniz, bu insanlar için tarihî bir olay. Her adımınızı izleyecekler, eylemlerinizle bu az gelişmiş dünyadaki yaşamlarını değiştirebilirsiniz."
languages.original_text: {n}Solomorne looks at the crowd staring at you in wonder and trepidation.{/n} "So, 'Celestial {mf|Lord|Lady}'... Your coming is a historic event for these people. They will be watching your every step, and your actions may well transform their lives on this underdeveloped world."

traits.locale_text: {n}Üsteğmen sana merakla ve endişeyle bakan kalabalığı izliyor.{/n} "'Semavi {mf|Lordumuz|Leydimiz} demek... Gelişiniz, bu insanlar için tarihî bir olay. Her adımınızı izleyecekler, eylemlerinizle bu az gelişmiş dünyadaki yaşamlarını değiştirebilirsiniz."

languages.text: {n}Solomorne observe la foule qui vous regarde avec étonnement et appréhension.{/n} « Eh bien, Votre Céleste Seigneurie... Votre venue est un événement historique pour ces gens. Ils surveilleront le moindre de vos faits et gestes, et ce que vous ferez pourrait bien changer à jamais la vie sur ce monde sous-développé. »
languages.original_text: {n}Solomorne looks at the crowd staring at you in wonder and trepidation.{/n} "So, 'Celestial {mf|Lord|Lady}'... Your coming is a historic event for these people. They will be watching your every step, and your actions may well transform their lives on this underdeveloped world."

traits.locale_text: {n}Solomorne observe la foule qui vous regarde avec étonnement et appréhension.{/n} « Eh bien, Votre Céleste Seigneurie... Votre venue est un événement historique pour ces gens. Ils surveilleront le moindre de vos faits et gestes, et ce que vous ferez pourrait bien changer à jamais la vie sur ce monde sous-développé. »

languages.text: {n}Solomorne lässt seinen Blick über die Menge schweifen, die dich ehrfurchtsvoll und ängstlich anstarrt.{/n} "Also, '{mf|himmlischer Herr|himmlische Herrin}'. Euer Erscheinen ist für diese Leute ein historisches Ereignis. Sie werden jeden Eurer Schritte verfolgen und alles, was Ihr tut, könnte ihr Leben auf dieser unterentwickelten Welt verändern."
languages.original_text: {n}Solomorne looks at the crowd staring at you in wonder and trepidation.{/n} "So, 'Celestial {mf|Lord|Lady}'... Your coming is a historic event for these people. They will be watching your every step, and your actions may well transform their lives on this underdeveloped world."
